name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, FiniteSubsets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
  /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}]
  /\ coordinator \in {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}
  /\ messages \in FiniteSubsets({1..N, 1..N, {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}})

Init ==
  /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"]
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ messages = {}

Prepare ==
  /\ coordinator = "Init"
  /\ coordinator' = "Prepared"
  /\ messages' = Append(messages, {coordinator, "Prepare", "Commit"})

VoteYes ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Init"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages = Append(messages, {i, "VoteYes", "Commit"})

VoteNo ==
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Init"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : messages = Append(messages, {i, "VoteNo", "Abort"})

Commit ==
  /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ coordinator' = "Committed"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"]
  /\ messages' = {}

Abort ==
  /\ coordinator = "Prepared"
  /\ \E i \in 1..N : participants[i] = "Prepared"
  /\ coordinator' = "Aborted"
  /\ \A i \in 1..N : participants' = [participants EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"]
  /\ messages' = {}

Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states


  states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"];  (* "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)

  endif

    pickUp(i)
  endif

    tryEat(i);

      putDown(i)
    endif
  endwhile

  for i \in 1..N do

  endfor
  for i \in 1..N do
    philosopher(i)
  endfor

*)

Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -> FALSE] /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> -> "thinking"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = FALSE
          /\ forks[Right(i)] = FALSE
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE, ![Right(i)] = TRUE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE, ![Right(i)] = FALSE]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ states[i] = "thinking"
          /\ forks' = forks
          /\ states' = states

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ \A j \in 1..N :
                j # i
                /\ flag[j] = FALSE
                \/ num[j] = 0
                \/ num[j] > num[i]
                \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, size

Init == /\ q = <<>> /\ size = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ size < K
     /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue 1
     /\ size' = size + 1
  \/ /\ size > 0
     /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue
     /\ size' = size - 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, size>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>  /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
        /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
        /\ writer_active' = 1
        /\ readers' = readers
    \/ /\ writer_active = 0
        /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
        /\ writer_active' = 0
        /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
    \/ /\ writer_active = 1
        /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
        /\ writer_active' = 0
        /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, channel, marker, finished, proc

(* State of each process: a record with fields *)
State == [proc \in 1..N |-> [value |-> Nat, finished |-> BOOLEAN]]

(* Channel state: a sequence of messages *)
Channel == [proc \in 1..N, proc' \in 1..N |-> Seq(Nat)]

(* Marker state: a set of processes that have received a marker *)
Marker == [proc \in 1..N |-> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state: all processes have value 0, not finished; all channels empty; no markers *)
Init == /\ state = [proc \in 1..N |-> [value |-> 0, finished |-> FALSE]]
        /\ channel = [proc \in 1..N, proc' \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [proc \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
        /\ finished = FALSE

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ (* Process sends a message *)
     /\ \E proc \in 1..N, proc' \in 1..N \ {proc}
        /\ state[proc][finished] = FALSE
        /\ channel[proc][proc']' = Append(channel[proc][proc'], state[proc][value] + 1)
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, finished>>
  \/ (* Process receives a message *)
     /\ \E proc \in 1..N, proc' \in 1..N \ {proc}
        /\ Len(channel[proc'][proc]) > 0
        /\ state[proc][value]' = Head(channel[proc'][proc])
        /\ channel[proc'][proc]' = Tail(channel[proc'][proc])
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker, finished>>
  \/ (* Process receives a marker *)
     /\ \E proc \in 1..N
        /\ marker[proc] = FALSE
        /\ Len(channel[proc'][proc]) > 0
        /\ marker'[proc] = TRUE
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, finished>>
  \/ (* Process finishes *)
     /\ \E proc \in 1..N
        /\ state[proc][finished] = FALSE
        /\ finished' = TRUE
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, marker>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker, finished>>

---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLE store

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : 
        /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<>>
  \/ \E k \in Keys : 
        /\ UNCHANGED store

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == 
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot : Nat, value : Nat]]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot : Nat, value : Nat]]
    /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == 
    /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
    /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
    /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(p) == 
    /\ proposers[p].ballot' = proposers[p].ballot + 1
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![p] = [acceptors[p] EXCEPT !.ballot = proposers[p].ballot']]
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![p] = [proposers[p] EXCEPT !.value = acceptors[p].value]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p) == 
    /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![p] = [acceptors[p] EXCEPT !.value = proposers[p].value]]
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Next == 
    \E p \in 1..M : 
        /\ proposers[p].value' = proposers[p].value
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        \/ Prepare(p)
        \/ Accept(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, ChunkSize, MaxRetries

VARIABLES SentChunks, Retries, AckedChunks, LostChunks

Init ==
    /\ SentChunks = <<>>
    /\ Retries = 0
    /\ AckedChunks = {}
    /\ LostChunks = {}

Next ==
    \/ /\ Len(SentChunks) < Len(File) /\ SentChunks' = Append(SentChunks, SubSeq(File, Len(SentChunks), ChunkSize))
        /\ Retries' = Retries
        /\ AckedChunks' = AckedChunks
        /\ LostChunks' = LostChunks
    \/ /\ Len(SentChunks) = Len(File) /\ Len(AckedChunks) < Len(File) /\ Retries' = Retries + 1
        /\ SentChunks' = SentChunks
        /\ AckedChunks' = AckedChunks
        /\ LostChunks' = LostChunks
    \/ /\ Len(SentChunks) = Len(File) /\ Len(AckedChunks) = Len(File) /\ Retries' = Retries
        /\ SentChunks' = SentChunks
        /\ AckedChunks' = AckedChunks
        /\ LostChunks' = LostChunks

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<SentChunks, Retries, AckedChunks, LostChunks>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolationDB ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS FiniteFunctionsSeq

VARIABLES data, txns, nextTxId, t

(* --type definition -- *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ data \in FiniteFunctionsSeq..Int
    /\ txns \in FiniteFunctionsSeq..Txn
    /\ nextTxId \in Int

(* --state definition -- *)
Txn == [id: Int, status: {"active", "committed", "aborted"}, 
        readSet: FiniteSubset[Seq], writeSet: FiniteSubset[Seq], 
        writeVals: FiniteFunctionsSeq..Int]

(* --initial state -- *)
Init == 
    /\ data = <<>>
    /\ txns = <<>>
    /\ nextTxId = 1

(* --next-state relation -- *)
Next == 
    \/ (* begin a new transaction *)
        /\ nextTxId' = nextTxId + 1
        /\ txns' = Append[txns, [id |-> nextTxId, status |-> "active", 
                                 readSet |-> <<>>, writeSet |-> <<>>, 
                                 writeVals |-> <<>>]]
        /\ data' = data
    \/ (* read a key *)
        /\ \E t \in txns : t.status = "active"
        /\ \E key \in Seq : key \in data
        /\ \E t \in txns : t.status = "active" 
           /\ key \in t.readSet
        /\ data' = data
    \/ (* write a key *)
        /\ \E t \in txns : t.status = "active"
        /\ \E key \in Seq : key \notin data
        /\ \E t \in txns : t.status = "active" 
           /\ key \in t.writeSet
        /\ data' = data
    \/ (* commit a transaction *)
        /\ \E t \in txns : t.status = "active"
        /\ \E t' \in txns : t'.status = "active" 
           /\ t' \notin t.writeSet
        /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t.id] = [t EXCEPT !status = "committed"]]
        /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![t.writeVals] = t.writeVals]
    \/ (* abort a transaction *)
        /\ \E t \in txns : t.status = "active"
        /\ txns' = [txns EXCEPT ![t.id] = [t EXCEPT !status = "aborted"]]
        /\ data' = data

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, txns, nextTxId>> 

====

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets



Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets' = [offsets EXCEPT ![i] = offsets[i] + RandomInt(-1, 1)]
          /\ clocks' = [clocks EXCEPT ![i] = clocks[i] + offsets'[i]]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, offsets>> \setminus <<clocks[i], offsets[i]>>

TypeOK == /\ clocks \in [1..N -> Int]
          /\ offsets \in [1..N -> Int]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = {}

Next == 
  /\ known' = known
  /\ infected' = 
      \E i \in 1..Len(known) :
          \E j \in 1..Len(known) :
              /\ i # j
              /\ known[i] # known[j]
              /\ known[i] \in infected
              /\ known[j] \in infected
              /\ known' = Append(known, known[j])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \/ /\ free # {}
          /\ \E p \in free :
                /\ free' = free \ {p}
                /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
        \/ /\ free = {}
          /\ \E c \in Clients :
                /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = {}]
                /\ free' = free \cup allocated[c]

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Clients : allocated[c] \subseteq free

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Message, Subscriber, Topic

VARIABLES subscribers, messages

(* TypeOK ensures that the state variables have the correct type *)
TypeOK == 
    subscribers \in [Topic -> SUBSET Subscriber] /\
    messages \in [Topic -> Seq(Message)]

(* Init sets up an empty broker *)
Init == 
    subscribers = [t \in Topic |-> {}] /\
    messages = [t \in Topic |-> <<>>]

(* Next describes how the broker evolves *)
Next == 
    \/ (* A subscriber registers interest in a topic *)
        /\ \E s \in Subscriber : \E t \in Topic :
            subscribers' = [subscribers EXCEPT ![t] = subscribers[t] \cup {s}] /\
            messages' = messages
    \/ (* A publisher posts a message on a topic *)
        /\ \E t \in Topic : \E m \in Message :
            subscribers' = subscribers /\
            messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![t] = Append(messages[t], m)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subscribers, messages>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [x \in {1,2} |-> FALSE]

Next == 
  \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[2] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants
  \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
      /\ wants[2] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[2] = FALSE
      /\ turn' = 2
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
  \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
      /\ wants[2] = TRUE
      /\ turn' = turn
      /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
